nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: What used to take me an hour or so, manually editing a photo, can now take just a minute

nodes.label: AI transparency and reproducibility
nodes.grounding_span: I want to see the process because I want to know what's going on so that if something goes awry I can fix it immediately

nodes.label: AI use for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I'd prefer to type the emails myself because I feel like personalized communication is important and I don't want my responses to sound robotic

nodes.label: Human oversight and decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: it's the coordination of those small parts that, I think, require a human to oversee

nodes.label: Company policy restricting AI tool use
nodes.grounding_span: our company limits which tools we can use in order to ensure that work is of a certain standard

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It's amazing to see how much time the technology can save me

nodes.label: Control and quality assurance
nodes.grounding_span: so that if something goes awry I can fix it immediately, and so I can make sure I don't accidentally leave those errors

nodes.label: Effective client relationships
nodes.grounding_span: personalized communication is important and I don't want my responses to sound robotic

nodes.label: Professional quality and thoroughness
nodes.grounding_span: ensure that work is of a certain standard

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for photo editing
nodes.grounding_span: I find using it in Photoshop very satisfying

nodes.label: Preference for human-written emails
nodes.grounding_span: I'd prefer to type the emails myself

nodes.label: Acceptance of human oversight requirement
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not concerned about AI taking over because my job consists of a lot of different small things

nodes.label: Frustration with company restrictions on AI
nodes.grounding_span: our company limits which tools we can use in order to ensure that work is of a certain standard

nodes.label: Collaborative process monitoring — prefers to see and intervene during AI process
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate throughout the process. I want to see the process

nodes.label: Context-dependent tool use — uses AI when alone, colleagues when available
nodes.grounding_span: If and when I have to work for a different person, my role and responsibilities will change, and at that point I may find a need for integrating more AI
